name: Aimei Health Technology Co., Ltd.
business: Aimei Health Technology Co., Ltd. is a blank check company (SPAC) formed to effect a merger with one or more businesses, targeting small cap companies in the biopharmaceutical, medical technology and device industries, and diagnostics and other services sector. It has not yet completed a business combination. The company consummated its IPO in December 2023 and has entered into a definitive business combination agreement with United Hydrogen Group Inc.

exposures.sentence: We seek to acquire small cap businesses in the biopharmaceutical, medical technology and device industries, as well as in the diagnostic and other services sector.
We seek to acquire small cap businesses in the biopharmaceutical, medical technology and device industries, as well as in the diagnostic and other services sector.
We seek to acquire small cap businesses in the biopharmaceutical, medical technology and device industries, as well as in the diagnostic and other services sector.

The consummation of the proposed Business Combination with United Hydrogen is conditioned upon, among other things, the completion of filing procedures with, and receipt of the required filing notice from, the CSRC pursuant to the Trial Administrative Measures of Overseas Securities Offering and Listing by Domestic Companies.

Geopolitical conflicts involving Iran, military actions in the Middle East, and the war in Ukraine may adversely affect global economic conditions and cause significant volatility in the trading price of our ordinary shares.

catalysts.sentence: As of the date of this Annual Report, the deadline for completing an initial business combination has been extended to May 6, 2026.

catalysts.event: Expected closing of Business Combination with United Hydrogen
catalysts.sentence: As of the date of this Annual Report, we currently expect to close the Business Combination by May 2026, subject to the satisfaction of customary closing conditions.

the deadline for completing our initial business combination has been extended to May 6, 2026, and may be further extended, up to a maximum of 36 months from the closing of our initial public offering (or December 6, 2026), subject to the Sponsor depositing the required monthly extension fees into the Trust Account.
